title: Kidplokio Fire Truck Firefighter Rescue Toy Pull Back Cars, Red, Boys Ages 3+

Kidplokio Fire Truck Firefighter Rescue Toy Pull Back Cars, Red, Boys Ages 3+

A classic children’s toy, the red Fire Truck Toy rescue vehicle from Kidplokio is fitted with fast-moving wheels, extendable ladder, vibrant colors and realistic fire truck graphics, and will have toddlers and young kids roaring to the rescue!

The fire truck toy features a long rescue ladder or crane that extends from the top of the truck for skyscraper rescue missions or high in the sky kitty cat retrievals; your little hero and their classic red fire truck toy will be ready to save the day with endless pretend play possibilities. Whether battling an indoor house fire or responding to a forest fire, the Kidplokio Fire Truck is the perfect toy to respond to all fire emergencies.

Key Features

  • FRICTION POWERED FIRE TRUCK TOY: An awesome fire truck toy for any firefighting fanatics! Fitted with fast-moving wheels, an extendable ladder, friction power and cool firefighting graphics, the Kidplokio Fire Truck toy will have little ones and young kids roaring to the rescue
  • AWESOME 360 ROTATING RESCUE CRANE: The fire truck toy features a long rescue ladder or crane that extends from the top of the truck for skyscraper rescue missions or high in the sky kitty cat retrievals; your little hero and their classic red fire truck toy will be ready to save the day with endless pretend play possibilities!
  • ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Not only will your little aspiring firefighter be thrilled and occupied for hours with this fire truck toy rescue vehicle, they’ll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like gross and fine motor skills, as well as cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions
  • NO BATTERIES OR ASSEMBLY NEEDED: The fire truck toy comes ready to rescue right out of the box; featuring pull and push friction power, kids can easily begin playing right away, no batteries required!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 16 x 3 x 3.5 inches; Color: Red; Weight: 0.568lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+
